name: Seared Scallops with Cucumber-Pepper Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 Serrano pepper, red, deveined and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice lemon grass stalk thinly crosswise.
2. Peel and halve cucumbers lengthwise, then seed and slice thin crosswise.
3. Relish: In a saucepan, combine lemon grass, vinegar, sugar, red pepper flakes, and 1/2 cup water. Bring to boil, then simmer until reduced to 1/2 cup. Strain into a bowl and let cool slightly before discarding solids. Stir in all other relish ingredients.
4. Season scallops with 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon white pepper.
5. Heat olive oil in a wok or non-stick skillet. Work in batches to avoid overcrowding, adding more oil as needed. Sauté scallops, turning once, until seared.
6. Spoon a portion of relish onto each plate. Arrange a portion of scallops over the relish and serve immediately.
